response.justification: A versatile, craftsmanship-oriented engineer with ~13 years across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backends (notably Sociomantic/Dunnhumby handling millions of requests/sec). However, this is a Principal/IC6 role centered on experimentation and growth-measurement platforms, and the resume shows no A/B testing, feature-flagging, experimentation-quality, or statistical analysis experience, nor demonstrated cross-org technical leadership at that level. The profile reads as a strong senior generalist rather than a Principal experimentation-systems specialist, so the core domain fit is missing.
strengths: High-scale, low-latency distributed systems experience (millions of req/sec at Sociomantic)
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, multi-language (C/C++, Java, JS/TS)
Breadth across full-stack, embedded, and AI-agent/developer tooling work
concerns: No experimentation, feature-flagging, or growth-measurement platform experience (core of the role)
Limited demonstrated data/statistical-analysis and telemetry-infrastructure depth
Title trajectory (Senior/Staff) and scope do not clearly evidence Principal/IC6 cross-org leadership
